nodes.name: .gitattributes
nodes.summary: Git line-ending configuration ensuring shell scripts are always checked out with LF endings to prevent CRLF corruption when running quality gate scripts on Windows.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Exclusion patterns for the understand-anything analysis tool, listing generated directories, test artifacts, data files, and virtual environments to skip during codebase indexing.

nodes.name: export_card_attrs.py
nodes.summary: Developer script that exports all 180 core-set bird cards as CSV rows with 44 unnormalized attribute columns (food costs, nest type, habitats, exchange vectors), useful for external analysis and card power research.

nodes.name: _bird_row
nodes.summary: Builds a complete CSV row dict for a single bird card, assembling food costs, nest bits, habitat flags, exchange vector, and all other attributes in unnormalized form.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Loads all core-set cards and writes one CSV row per bird to stdout or a named file, using DictWriter with the full attribute column list.

nodes.name: check_mp_collect.py
nodes.summary: Diagnostic script that benchmarks the multiprocessing game collector (ProcessCollector) by running multiple collector workers and reporting throughput, game counts, and validation checks.

nodes.name: gen_arch_experiment.py
nodes.summary: Script that generates a set of YAML run-config files for architecture ablation experiments, sweeping hyperparameter combinations and optionally printing a tournament command to compare results.

nodes.name: measure_ipc.py
nodes.summary: Diagnostic script that measures inter-process communication overhead by benchmarking pickle serialization/deserialization of game records and analyzing state-vector sparsity.

nodes.name: profile_collection.py
nodes.summary: Profiling harness that measures sequential vs. batched game collection throughput, patches encode functions with a timer context manager, and runs cProfile attribution to identify encoding bottlenecks.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index documenting the agents subpackage modules, including the Agent protocol, random agent reference implementation, and neural-network agent wrappers.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index documenting the cards subpackage, covering immutable bird/bonus/goal card definitions, enumerations, and the parse subpackage for JSON loading.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the cards.parse subpackage describing the JSON loader, power-text regex matchers, and EffectKind registry that converts raw text into structured card data.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the cloud subpackage documenting containerized training run entry points, S3 persistence helpers, and the cloud monitor module.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the encode subpackage describing state and choice tensor encoders, layout constants, and the stripes subpackage for programmatic stripe registration.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the encode.stripes subpackage documenting the programmatic stripe registry that maps game-state dimensions to tensor offsets.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the engine subpackage documenting the core Engine class, actions, reactors, scoring, collection utilities, and the powers subpackage for bird-power dispatch.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the engine.powers subpackage documenting the EffectKind dispatcher, brown/white/pink power handler modules, and the UNIMPLEMENTED fallback.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the instrumentation subpackage documenting event-callback hooks, the callback registry, and the handlers subpackage for game-event observers.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the model subpackage documenting the PolicyValueNet architecture, ModelArchitecture descriptor, and checkpoint loading utilities.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the players subpackage documenting CLI seat-spec parsing utilities that instantiate the correct Agent for each player slot.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the reporting subpackage documenting model introspection utilities and HTML report generation for training runs.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the setup_model subpackage documenting the value-regression bandit used for the bird-selection setup phase, separate from the main policy-value network.

nodes.name: INDEX.md
nodes.summary: Per-package index for the tournament subpackage documenting the round-robin tournament runner, match scheduling, and result aggregation modules.

nodes.name: __main__.py
nodes.summary: Unified CLI dispatcher for the wingspan package, routing sub-commands (play, dashboard, tournament, cloud, monitor, inspect) to their respective entry-point functions via a match statement.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Python 3.10+ structural pattern matching (match/case) for command dispatch with lazy module imports to avoid upfront loading costs.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Parses argv, dispatches to the appropriate sub-command entry point via match/case, and returns a shell exit code.

nodes.name: introspect.py
nodes.summary: Model introspection module providing utilities to inspect and report on the trained PolicyValueNet, referenced in __main__.py but absent from the current working tree (possibly relocated to reporting.inspect_cli).

nodes.name: report.py
nodes.summary: HTML report generation module for training run summaries and game statistics, absent from the current working tree (possibly relocated to the reporting subpackage).

nodes.name: report_svg.py
nodes.summary: SVG-based report generation helper for visual game statistics output, absent from the current working tree (possibly relocated to the reporting subpackage).
